candidates.why: Could be short-term debt if present, but current values are mostly zero/blank and may be part of broader current borrowings.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the clean current maturities debt line for STD. Did not include 'Bank overdraft facility' to avoid possible double counting and because the maturity line appears to capture the main current debt amount.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line.
Gross PPE total; valid fallback if net total is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation - Property, Plant & Equipment - Cash Flow
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Other investments in property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Best semantic match to total/net PPE on the balance sheet; preferred over gross under the stated rule.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value

variables.notes: Preferred the net PPE total label first because it best matches PPEGT semantics, even though recent preview values are blank. Included the gross total as a secondary priority label if the net line is unavailable in some years.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow preferred for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Duplicate capitalization variant, still before working-capital changes and therefore not preferred.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
